title: StarCraft
edition_pinned: Genre evidence from archived eBay product page for StarCraft (PC, 1998) - European Version, ePID 56232775, captured 2026-01-30 and observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 1998 base-game design and excludes the 1998 Brood War expansion.
moat: Asymmetric factions and fog-of-war scouting turn economy timing into counter-production commitments.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Three sharply asymmetric factions recombine shared maps, resources, and vision rules into distinct strategic matchups.
exemplar_rationale: Defines competitive real-time strategy through scouting, production timing, and faction asymmetry.

evidence.claim: Archived eBay Product Key Features listed Genre: Strategy for StarCraft (PC, 1998) - European Version.
